headline: ₹500-1,500 Cr at risk (market cap fluctuation, not cash flow impact) — ICICI Bank shares fall 3% amid market fluctuations, reflecting passive fund rebalancing risk.
what_matters: No P/E compression or margin erosion; revenue at risk is negligible.
BRSR, GRI, DJSI, ESRS frameworks referenced, but no regulatory deadlines or penalties triggered.
No material change in cost of capital or bond spreads; FII outflow risk is minimal.
